---
title: "2026"
description: "The Lodge · 21–26 June 2026 · Philosophy and Biology Shop Talks"
---

PaBST 2026 — *Philosophy and Biology Shop Talks* — ran from **21–26 June 2026**,
a week of talks, walks, and long conversations at the Lodge. The week also hosted
the **BaM!** (*Biology and Models*) Camp, whose participants gave the Tuesday
lightning talks.

The workshop was funded by the **John Templeton Foundation** through the grant
*"The Emergence and Evolution of Goal-Directed Behavior in Collective Entities."*

## On this page

- [Talks](talks.qmd) — the full week's programme
- [People](people.qmd) — speakers, organisers, and participants
- [Photos](photos.qmd) — snapshots from the meeting
